title: Tender Tunisian Bread Tagine
description: A traditional Tunisian dish featuring dark soft brown sugar and double-rise-bread, this tagine is a bitter, shaggy, and indulgent treat, made satvik-friendly by omitting animal products.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the bread into 1-inch thick slices and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle the olive oil over the bread and sprinkle with cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Bake the bread in the oven for 10 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
In a large saucepan, combine the dark soft brown sugar, chopped onion, and minced garlic.
Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until the onion is translucent and the sugar has dissolved.
Add the toasted bread to the saucepan and stir to combine with the sugar and onion mixture.
Add the water to the saucepan and bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
